title: Six Senses India Capital India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Six Senses India Capital India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Six Senses India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Six Senses India Capital India:
Six Senses India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India Capital India!
